reason: A passionate teacher’s tough methods push students to seize the day, blurring care and cruelty.
Drill sergeant’s relentless pressure breaks down recruits to teach them survival.
A math genius finds his limits tested by a therapist whose methods probe too deeply.
An idealistic music teacher’s well-meaning rigidity strains his students and his marriage.
A former Marine’s tough love classroom style challenges troubled teens at every turn.
A stoic mentor restores a troubled teen’s purpose, but at what emotional cost?
Rivalry of genius pushes a protégé to obsession under a resentful master.
A ruthless editor mentors a timid writer, examing his morals through brutal trials.
An ex-soldier’s austere teaching methods strain fragile student trust.
A gentle giant guides a young boy, hesitating between protection and control.
